title: erigeron supplex
intro: Erigeron supplex, also known as Flish or Dwarf Fleabane, is a low-growing perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Erigeron supplex include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Erigeron supplex can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
